domains.name: Cyber Risk Governance
domains.description: Establishes the overarching cyber resilience framework (CRF), governance structures, dedicated cyber risk functions, CISO reporting lines, and board-level oversight of cyber risk posture.

domains.name: NCII Compliance
domains.description: Ensures compliance with National Critical Information Infrastructure obligations under NACSA directives, including designation acknowledgement, additional security measures, and reporting requirements.

domains.name: Network Security
domains.description: Covers network segmentation, perimeter defence, firewall deployment at critical segments, intrusion prevention, web and email filtering, endpoint protection, APT solutions, DDoS mitigation, and time synchronisation.

domains.name: Data Security
domains.description: Addresses encryption of PII and sensitive data at rest, data loss prevention technology and policies, data classification, inventory management, third-party data controls, and confidential-information-barrier prevention.

domains.name: SOC Operations
domains.description: Defines Security Operations Centre capabilities including SIEM deployment, incident coordination, vulnerability management, threat hunting, forensic readiness, playbook maintenance, reporting cadence, and 24x7 monitoring.

domains.name: Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing
domains.description: Governs VAPT standard operating procedures, quarterly vulnerability assessments, annual and pre-launch penetration tests, compromise assessments, documentation and escalation protocols, and crowdsourced security testing.

domains.name: API Security
domains.description: Ensures comprehensive API inventory management, availability and scaling controls, secure coding practices, encryption and key management, anti-brute-force measures, authentication protocols, gateway deployment, and continuous monitoring.

domains.name: Cyber Operations
domains.description: Encompasses cyber-attack lifecycle defence, continuous monitoring of assets, cyber threat intelligence integration, anomalous activity response, and red team exercises to validate defensive posture.

domains.name: Incident Response
domains.description: Covers cyber crisis management structures, Cyber Incident Response Plan establishment, CERT readiness, out-of-band communications, annual cyber drills, drill scenarios and board reporting, and post-incident review processes.

domains.name: Cyber Insurance & Reporting
domains.description: Addresses cyber insurance coverage adequacy, terms and conditions review, policyholder obligations, incident notification to BNM and stakeholders, threat intelligence sharing, and cross-industry collaboration.

domains.name: Digital Services Security
domains.description: Extends cyber resilience to digital service delivery including fraud countermeasures, defence-in-depth for mobile channels, continuous surveillance, coordinated incident handling, customer protection and empowerment, kill switch mechanisms, and post-incident customer measures.

domains.name: Security Awareness & Training
domains.description: Mandates cybersecurity awareness programmes for all staff, specialised training for technical personnel, board-level cyber education, and extension of awareness programmes to third-party service providers.
